project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.CashFlow.Consolidation.API: IIS Express.executor": "Debug", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.CashFlow.Consolidation.Worker.executor": "Debug", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.CashFlow.Gateway.executor": "Debug", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.CashFlow.Gateway: http.executor": "Debug", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.CashFlow.Transactions.API.executor": "Debug", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.CashFlow.Transactions.API: http.executor": "Debug", "Compound.CashFlow.executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "deletionFromPopupRequiresConfirmation": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "feature/implementa-ADR-002-database-per-service.md", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.sourceCode.C#", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
